context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 75
WINDOW: 1143.767s to 1180.400s (smile at 1163.767s to 1165.400s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: Germans. The first five minutes I marched, maybe five, six minutes, is now a German soldier-- in German, what are you doing here? And since I speak those languages, I told him in German I was forcefully evacuated by the Poles. So he took me for a German. He never asked me if I was  a Jew, because at that time at the beginning, there was no Jewish questions. They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
So he took me for a German.

He never asked me if I was  a Jew, because at that time at the beginning, there was no Jewish questions. They didn't know-- there was no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me.
